officialSources.title: API: Frontier Models for Reasoning & Enterprise | xAI
Grok 4.20 Multi Agent Beta 0309 | xAI Docs

xai/grok-4.3.description: Most advanced flagship model with industry-leading non-hallucination rate, agentic tool calling, and instruction following. Supports both non-reasoning and configurable reasoning modes (low, medium, high).[reference:0][reference:1]
xai/grok-4.3.notes: Context window: 1M tokens.[reference:2][reference:3] Cached input: $0.20/1M tokens.[reference:4] Requests exceeding 200K context window are charged at different rates.[reference:5]

xai/grok-4.20-multi-agent.description: Designed for multi-agent orchestration where multiple agents collaborate in parallel for deep research tasks and document analysis.[reference:6]
xai/grok-4.20-multi-agent.notes: Context window: 1M tokens.[reference:7] Cached input: $0.20/1M tokens.[reference:8] Requests exceeding 200K context window are charged at different rates.[reference:9]

xai/grok-4.20-reasoning.description: Reasoning-optimized flagship model with industry-leading speed and the lowest hallucination rate on the market.[reference:10]
xai/grok-4.20-reasoning.notes: Context window: 1M tokens.[reference:11] Cached input: $0.20/1M tokens.[reference:12] Requests exceeding 200K context window are charged at different rates.[reference:13]

xai/grok-4.20.description: Standard flagship model with reasoning disabled for fast, non-reasoning completions.
xai/grok-4.20.notes: Context window: 1M tokens.[reference:14] Cached input: $0.20/1M tokens.[reference:15]

xai/grok-build.description: Fast coding model trained specifically for agentic software engineering and application development. Currently in early access.[reference:16]
xai/grok-build.notes: Context window: 256K tokens.[reference:17][reference:18] Cached input: $0.20/1M tokens.[reference:19]

grok.description: AI assistant with chat, reasoning, and multimodal capabilities.

deepsearch.description: Advanced search with deep reasoning over web and X content.

deepersearch.description: Enhanced search with multi-step reasoning and analysis.

think.description: Extended reasoning mode for complex problem-solving.

expert.description: Specialized expert personas for domain-specific tasks.

image-generation.description: AI-powered image creation from text prompts. Powered by Grok Imagine models with flat per-image pricing.[reference:20]

image-editing.description: Edit and refine images using AI.

video-generation.description: AI-powered video generation with per-second pricing based on duration and resolution.[reference:21]

developer-api.description: Programmatic access to all Grok models with usage-based pricing. Compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs.[reference:22]

function-calling.description: Connect models to external tools and systems.[reference:23]

structured-outputs.description: Return responses in specific, organized formats.[reference:24]

batch-api.description: Batch processing with discounted pricing for text and language models.[reference:25]

vision.description: Multimodal vision capabilities for image understanding.

realtime-api.description: Build real-time voice agents with speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and conversational AI.[reference:26]

plans.notes: Limited daily usage with access to Grok and basic multimodal features.
Higher rate limits, Grok 4 access, frontier models, image/video generation, connectors, and Expert mode.[reference:27]
Highest consumer/business tier with maximum rate limits and access to advanced Grok capabilities.[reference:28]
Custom enterprise pricing with dedicated onboarding, SSO, audit logging, data residency, and custom rate limits.

Usage-based token pricing with access to all public Grok models, realtime APIs, and developer tools. Developers may be eligible for up to $150/month in free API credits via the data-sharing program.[reference:29]

videoGeneration.description: grok-imagine-video: $0.01/sec input. Output: 480p $0.05/sec, 720p $0.07/sec. grok-imagine-video-1.5: $0.01/img input. Output: 480p $0.08/sec, 720p $0.14/sec, 1080p $0.25/sec.[reference:37][reference:38]

realtimeVoice.description: Voice Agent API for real-time conversational AI.[reference:39]

batchApi.description: Batch discount applies to text and language models only. See model detail pages for specific batch pricing.[reference:42]

dataSharing.description: Developers may be eligible for up to $150/month in free API credits via the data-sharing program. Verify current availability in the xAI console.[reference:43]

apiPricing.notes: All prices in USD per 1M tokens unless otherwise noted. Requests exceeding 200K context window are charged at different rates for models with 1M token context.[reference:44] Tool requests are priced based on token usage and server-side tool invocations.[reference:45]

notes: xAI operates a dual model: consumer subscriptions (Free, SuperGrok at $30/mo, SuperGrok Heavy at $300/mo) and API access with usage-based token pricing. Grok 4.3 is the current flagship model with 1M token context and pricing at $1.25/MTok input and $2.50/MTok output. The Grok 4.20 family includes multi-agent, reasoning, and non-reasoning variants. Grok Build (grok-build-0.1) is an early-access coding model. Image and video generation are available through the Imagine API with flat per-image and per-second pricing. The Realtime Voice API is priced at $0.05/min. Batch API discounts are available for text and language models.
